title: superyes Ceramic Coffee Mugs-Set of 6, 12oz(360ml) Pink Blue Cup Set for Cappuccino Latte, Easy-Grip Handle, Feature Unique Raised Designs
features: Modern Design: The High-Quality Porcelain Mugs set includes 6 ceramic pink and gray cups both feature unique raised designs, enhancing visual appeal, and have a rounded overall shape. Each with a large Easy-Grip Handle, making them perfect for holding your favourite drinks. The cups have a simple yet charming rustic design that adds a touch of character to your home decor.

Easy to Clean: The cups have been crafted using a ceramic glazing process, resulting in a waterproof finish that won't leak and is easy to clean. The set of 6 High-Quality Porcelain Mugs set are also safe for use in the dishwasher, freezer, microwave, and oven. Plus, the smooth bottom of these mugs increases their stability and won't scratch your table or countertop.

Better Value : Our high-quality mug set undoubtedly offers better value for money. The smooth glaze leaves no stains, and the well-designed shape with a sturdy body is perfect for keeping winter hot drinks warm while also warming your hands, or for enjoying refreshing cold drinks in summer. Durable and suitable for both microwave and dishwasher use.

Durability and Well-packaged: The smooth bottoms of the cups prevent any scratching on your surfaces, ensuring their durability. Additionally, the cups are carefully packaged with shock-absorbing materials, ensuring safe delivery to your doorstep.

Multipurpose Use : These cups are not just cups but decorative item, making them an ideal choice for everyday use as well as special occasions. Whether you want to sip on your morning coffee or enjoy a relaxing cup of tea, these cups are perfect for any occasion, such as weddings, birthdays, and festivals.
